arts.ttl: Roy Keane rips into 'disgraceful' Man United flops and singles out four players who must improve after showing 'no reaction' in horror start under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: United have lost six of their first 11 games since Amorim took charge, leaving them 14th in the Premier League ahead of their trip to runaway leaders Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane fumes at 'disgraceful' Man Utd flops and calls out four players
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a tough season despite changing managers, and their former captain Roy Keane has taken aim at their expensively-assembled group of players

arts.ttl: Man Utd latest: Rashford 'in talks' to join European giants
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly want to offload Marcus Rashford during the January transfer window and a move to AC Milan is now on the cards. News of Milan’s interest in Rashford comes following his recent admission that he is keen to leave Man Utd in 2025.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim provides Marcus Rashford update after wantaway star is again left out of Red Devils squad for huge Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has explained Marcus Rashford's absence after the wantaway forward was left out of Manchester United 's squad for Sunday's trip to rivals Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer latest: Winger reportedly in January window negotiations, Arne Slot green lights exit
arts.sum: One of Liverpool's wingers is allegedly in contact with a major European club about a potential move in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho makes cryptic social media move before Liverpool vs Man Utd
arts.sum: The young Argentine winger has drawn confusion from fans over his activity

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho major decision confirmed hours before Man United vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim dropped Alejandro Garnacho for the Manchester derby last month and the winger has not started any of the four Manchester United matches since that move

arts.ttl: 'I will not change' - Ruben Amorim doubles down on his plan for Manchester United
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon and Ruben Amorim explained his team selection before kick-off.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate Returns For Liverpool vs. Manchester United
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konaté will make his return from injury in Liverpool's Premier League match against Manchester United on Sunday afternoon, as the defender has been inc

arts.ttl: What Gary Neville did at Anfield before Liverpool game speaks volumes about Manchester United
arts.sum: Manchester United make the short journey over to Liverpool in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon
